source_pr.title: planner: Fix vector not truncated after CBO
source_pr.body: ### What problem does this PR solve? Issue Number: Close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/58837 Problem Summary: ### What changed and how does it work? After CBO is introduced, vector is not truncated in explain. This is what it looks like now without this PR: Upstream PR: https://github.com/tidbcloud/tidb-cse/pull/1416 ### Check List Tests - [x] Unit test - [ ] Integration test - [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below) - [ ] No need to test > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed. > Side effects - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU - [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory - [ ] Breaking backward compatibility Documentation - [ ] Affects user behaviors - [ ] Contains syntax changes - [ ] Contains variable changes - [ ] Contains experimental features - [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility ### Release note Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note. ```release-note None ```

symptoms: tk.MustQuery(fmt.Sprintf("explain format = 'brief' select * from t1 order by vec_cosine_distance(vec, '%s') limit 1", vb.String())).Check(testkit.Rows( (pkg/expression/integration_test/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: tk.MustQuery(fmt.Sprintf("explain format = 'brief' select * from t1 order by vec_cosine_distance(vec, '%s') limit 1", vb.String())).Check(testkit.Rows( (pkg/expression/integration_test/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: After CBO is introduced, vector is not truncated in explain.
fix_pattern: After CBO is introduced, vector is not truncated in explain. This is what it looks like now without this PR:
